name: Construct Point
description: Create a point from {x}, {y}, {z} coordinates

name: Deconstruct Point
description: Deconstruct a point into its component parts

name: Unit X
description: Unit vector parallel to world {x} axis

name: Unit Y
description: Unit vector parallel to world {y} axis

name: Unit Z
description: Unit vector parallel to world {z} axis

name: Vector XYZ
description: Create a vector from {x}, {y}, {z} components

name: XY Plane
description: World XY plane with origin at {0,0,0}

name: Construct Plane
description: Create a plane from origin point and two direction vectors

name: Circle
description: Create a circle on a plane (defaults to world XY origin) with a given radius. Preferred over Circle CNR because no explicit center point is required.

name: Line
description: Create a line between two points

name: Line SDL
description: Create a line from a start point, direction, and length

name: Rectangle
description: Create a rectangle on a plane

name: Polygon
description: Create a polygon with a given number of segments

name: Arc
description: Create an arc defined by plane, radius, and angle

name: Interpolate
description: Create an interpolated curve through a set of points

name: Polyline
description: Create a polyline through a set of points

name: Nurbs Curve
description: Construct a nurbs curve from control points

name: Divide Curve
description: Divide a curve into equal length segments

name: Evaluate Curve
description: Evaluate a curve at a specified parameter

name: Offset Curve
description: Offset a curve by a given distance

name: Fillet
description: Fillet a curve at all discontinuities

name: Extrude
description: Extrude curves along a direction vector

name: Extrude Point
description: Extrude a curve to a point (creates a cone-like surface)

name: Loft
description: Create a lofted surface through a set of section curves

name: Sweep1
description: Sweep a section curve along a rail curve

name: Surface from Points
description: Create a surface from a grid of points

name: Boundary Surfaces
description: Create a planar surface from closed boundary curves

name: Evaluate Surface
description: Evaluate a surface at {uv} coordinate

name: Divide Surface
description: Generate a grid of points on a surface

name: Move
description: Translate (move) an object along a vector

name: Scale
description: Scale an object uniformly from a center point

name: Rotate
description: Rotate an object in a plane

name: Mirror
description: Mirror an object about a plane

name: Orient
description: Orient an object from one plane to another

name: Series
description: Create a series of numbers

name: Range
description: Create a range of evenly spaced numbers

name: Random
description: Generate a list of pseudo-random numbers

name: List Item
description: Retrieve a specific item from a list

name: List Length
description: Get the number of items in a list

name: Reverse List
description: Reverse the order of a list

name: Flatten
description: Flatten a data tree into a single list

name: Graft Tree
description: Graft a data tree by adding an extra branch at every item

name: Addition
description: Mathematical addition

name: Subtraction
description: Mathematical subtraction

name: Multiplication
description: Mathematical multiplication

name: Division
description: Mathematical division

name: Negative
description: Negate a numeric value

name: Power
description: Raise a value to a power

name: Absolute
description: Compute the absolute value

name: Sine
description: Compute the sine of an angle (in radians)

name: Cosine
description: Compute the cosine of an angle (in radians)

name: Remap Numbers
description: Remap numbers from one domain to another

name: Construct Domain
description: Create a numeric domain from two numbers

name: Expression
description: Evaluate a mathematical expression with variable inputs

name: Solid Union
description: Boolean union of two or more Breps

name: Solid Difference
description: Boolean difference (subtraction) of two Breps

name: Solid Intersection
description: Boolean intersection of two Breps

name: Brep | Brep
description: Find the intersection curves of two Breps

name: Project Point
description: Project points onto Brep or Mesh surfaces

name: Box
description: Create a box from a base plane and dimensions

name: Sphere
description: Create a sphere from a base plane and radius

name: Cylinder
description: Create a cylinder from a base circle and height

name: Cap Holes
description: Cap all planar holes in a Brep

name: Mesh Brep
description: Create a mesh from a Brep shape

name: Construct Mesh
description: Create a mesh from vertices and face lists

name: Mesh Join
description: Join multiple meshes into one

name: Linear Array
description: Create a linear array of geometry

name: Polar Array
description: Create a polar (rotational) array of geometry

name: Bake
description: Bake geometry into the Rhino document

name: Colour Swatch
description: A colour (ARGB) swatch parameter

name: Custom Preview
description: Preview geometry with custom materials

name: Curve | Curve
description: Find the intersection points of two curves

name: Region Union
description: Boolean union of closed planar curves

name: Area
description: Compute the area and centroid of a surface or Brep

name: Volume
description: Compute the volume and centroid of a closed Brep

name: Dispatch
description: Dispatch the items in a list based on a boolean pattern

name: Cull Pattern
description: Cull (remove) elements from a list using a boolean pattern

name: Join Curves
description: Join as many curves as possible

name: Explode
description: Explode a curve into its component segments

name: Brep Join
description: Join a set of Breps together

name: Deconstruct Brep
description: Deconstruct a Brep into its constituent parts

name: Pipe
description: Create a pipe surface along a rail curve

name: Planar Srf
description: Create planar surfaces from closed boundary curves

name: Closest Point
description: Find the closest point in a collection

name: Distance
description: Compute the distance between two points

name: Populate 2D
description: Populate a 2D region with random points

name: Rectangular Grid
description: Create a rectangular grid of points

name: Hexagonal Grid
description: Create a hexagonal grid of points

name: Voronoi
description: Create a Voronoi diagram from a set of points

name: Delaunay Mesh
description: Create a Delaunay triangulation mesh from points

name: Scale NU
description: Scale an object non-uniformly along different axes

name: Curve Length
description: Measure the length of a curve

name: End Points
description: Extract the end points of a curve

name: Graph Mapper
description: Remap values through a user-defined graph

name: Cluster Input
description: Input parameter for a cluster

name: Cluster Output
description: Output parameter for a cluster
